label: Gloamslate Quarters
description: Gloamslate Quarters consists of a narrow basaltcrete flat sealed behind ash-gaskets and scored with decades of abrasive windborne grit. The walls are lined with recessed ration lockers and conduit chases whose shielding plates bear standard Imperial maintenance stencils bleached to near illegibility. A low sleeping alcove and fold-down work surface occupy opposing ends, leaving a central strip of cracked decking kept clear for movement and equipment storage. Illumination relies on a single lumen strip filtered through soot-stained baffles, casting the room in a constant bruise-toned half-light that reflects Vespera Tertius’ auroral nightside.
